General.Name: Prime Intelligence Solutions Group
General.Description: Prime Intelligence Solutions Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides biometrics identifications solutions in Hong Kong, Macau, and the People's Republic of China. Its biometrics identification device functions include face, fingerprint, finger vein, hand geometry, and iris identifications. The company engages in the sale of biometrics identification devices, security products, and other devices and accessories; and provides auxiliary and other services, including maintenance, installation, and solution services. It also offers application software and related after-sale services; system installation; repair and maintenance services; and software licensing services, as well as online information and digital marketing services. In addition, the company is involved in sales and provision of installation and maintenance of security and information technology system services. Prime Intelligence Solutions Group Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Olympia Plaza, North Point, Hong Kong
